blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip and admin files manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy dist.zip via deploy.php with new DEPLOY_KEY URL; verify with Ctrl+F5 (hero loads fast, menu toggle works)
human_actions_pending.context: dist.zip contains perf rounds 3-4 and mobile UX fixes. DEPLOY_KEY was generated and given to user for api/config.local.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Fill SMTP_PASS (mail.ru app password) in api/config.local.php
human_actions_pending.context: Email channel for form notifications still down until SMTP password set.

human_actions_pending.action: Enable 'Обрабатывать статику через Apache' in hostiman panel (Sites → sunlife-photo.ru settings)
human_actions_pending.context: Needed for 1-year cache headers and to close public *.backup.json files. Alternative: support ticket with nginx deny rules.

decisions.decision: Store admin users in users.php (PHP file returning an array) instead of users.json, with auto-migration on first read.
decisions.rationale: nginx serves .json statically bypassing Apache/.htaccess protection, so password hashes were publicly downloadable. A .php file is always executed and outputs nothing. Works regardless of server static-file config.

decisions.decision: Default-deny in admin API save action: files outside permissionMap require admin role.
decisions.rationale: site.json and gallery-portfolio.json (and any future files) were writable by any authenticated editor — confirmed privilege escalation in local test.

decisions.decision: Add/delete in admin JS re-renders from local state (loadSection(section, true)) after syncing DOM into currentData, instead of immediate server refetch; uploads save immediately via the same sync helpers.
decisions.rationale: Server refetch after local mutation silently discarded all add/delete operations and unsaved edits (confirmed in puppeteer run).

decisions.decision: Register inline-handler functions via Object.assign(window, {...}) in admin.js.
decisions.rationale: oxlint cannot see references from inline onclick/onchange HTML strings and reported ~49 false-positive unused-vars; explicit registration keeps the linter useful for real dead code (now 0 warnings).

next_action: Deploy fresh dist.zip with DEPLOY_KEY URL (perf rounds 3-4, mobile UX, menu toggle fix). Then: SMTP_PASS, enable Apache static processing in hostiman panel (cache headers + json deny). Backlog: todo-011, todo-005 (needs Metrica ID), font subsetting for ruble sign.
context_notes: 2026-07-21/22: perf rounds 3-4 done — PSI 75→~85 (local 88): hero instant paint in prerender, skeleton min-heights (CLS 0), fonts.css eager→inlined, Onest preload, responsive hero 103→27KB. Real-browser CLS=0 verified; PSI CLS readings are flaky. Hosting sweep: old /dist.zip (3.2MB) found and deleted by user. Mobile UX: heading line breaks, testimonial swipe+autoplay both sliders, single back-to-top above bottom bar (hides when contact menu open via custom event), menu toggle bug fixed (menuRef scope), tighter header/bar offsets. Repo is private now (push works). Still pending: SMTP_PASS, Apache static option (json/cache), BOT_TOKEN revoke, DEPLOY_KEY already in config template. Latest commits: 2616ffa, 2b9edef, 725c07a.
